sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif pragmatique + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-format comprehension), then self-audited before commit. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ 2 (Hachette), Dossier 3 'La France vue par...', Leçon 2 (vivre ailleurs, le changement de vie; les pronoms démonstratifs celui/celle/ceux/celles). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
